warm_up: Review top error from last session: vocabulary.
focus: Modal verb conjugation in first and second person singular ('ich möchte', 'du möchtest', 'ich will', 'du willst') — Robert produced 'ich möchten' and 'möchetest du' this session, so drilling the full present-tense paradigm of 'möchten' and 'wollen' with short role-play prompts would directly address his most frequent error pattern.
speaking_prompt: You arrive at your hotel near the Ringstraße after a long flight. Herr Fischer greets you at the front desk. Check in, ask about the WiFi, and confirm your checkout date.
carry_forward_errors: Ich weiß nicht, wie man das auf Deutsch sagt (was: Ich weiß nicht aut Deutsche Sagan) — session 2026-05-07
